linting.notes: golangci-lint is the primary Go linter with extensive configuration. kube-linter validates Kubernetes manifests with security-focused checks (CRITICAL/HIGH findings block PRs). yamllint enforces YAML style consistency.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses Ginkgo/Gomega matchers and controller-runtime envtest for Kubernetes API mocking
testing.notes: Unit tests use Ginkgo with parallel execution (8 procs). Integration tests require a Kubernetes cluster. E2E tests require full OpenShift/K8s environment. Prometheus alert tests use promtool. Tests in pkg/upgrade/ may have build issues.

gating_checks.name: unit-test
gating_checks.command: make manifests-all && make get-manifests && make unit-test

advisory_checks.name: integration-tests
advisory_checks.command: Integration tests triggered by PR label

ci.notes: Integration tests require 'run-integration-tests' label and build custom catalog images. E2E tests run on actual clusters. Kube-linter blocks only on CRITICAL/HIGH severity findings.

build.notes: Uses Go 1.25.7. Requires manifests generation before build. Supports building operator image with 'make image-build'.

conventions.test_naming: Go test files use '_test.go' suffix. Ginkgo tests use Describe/It/Context blocks. Test functions must start with 'Test'.
conventions.import_style: Uses custom import aliases defined in .golangci.yml (e.g., dsciv1, dscv1, k8serr). Three-section import grouping: standard, default, opendatahub-io prefix.
conventions.notes: Uses controller-runtime patterns. Tests extensively use envtest for Kubernetes API simulation.

test_commands.notes: Most tests pass. Tests run with Ginkgo parallel execution. Some tests in pkg/upgrade/ have build issues.

container_recipe.notes: Tests take several minutes to run. Integration tests require external Kubernetes cluster. Use 'make manifests-all' and 'make get-manifests' before running tests.

results.notes: Go modules download completed without errors

results.output_snippet: Generated manifests for both ODH and RHOAI platforms
results.notes: Manifests generation successful for both OpenDataHub and RHOAI

results.output_snippet:
PASS coverage: 77.7% of statements
fork/exec /app/pkg/upgrade/upgrade.test: no such file or directory
results.notes: Most tests passed with 77.7% coverage, but pkg/upgrade tests have build issues

validation.summary: install OK, manifests OK, lint OK (0 issues), tests PARTIAL (most pass, pkg/upgrade has issues)

gaps: pkg/upgrade/ tests have build issues that prevent full test suite completion
Integration tests require external Kubernetes cluster and cannot be validated in container
E2E tests require full OpenShift/Kubernetes environment with operator deployed
kube-linter requires rendered manifests and cannot be easily validated in isolation
